title: EnhancedMC Vanilla
description: A lightweight modpack that optimizes and improves Minecraft with several features and enhancements.
body:
# EnhancedMC Vanilla  
EnhancedMC Vanilla is a lightweight modpack that optimizes and improves Minecraft with several features and enhancements.  
  
## Features  
- Compatible with vanilla servers and realms
- Almost complete OptiFine parity
- Better performance
- Enhanced sounds and graphics
- Fixed Minecraft bugs
- QoL improvements
- Includes Essential Mod, so you can host your world for free and chat with your friends*
- Voice chat (in hosted worlds and in supported servers)  
  
## Mods  
You can see the list of mods included in the modpack in the version page.
<details>
<summary>Recommended mods:</summary>
- Distant Horizons (remove ScalableLux if you install this mod)
</details>


  
## Issues and suggestions  
You can report issues and give suggestions here: https://github.com/luciobortoletto/enmcv/issues.  
  
*If you don't like the paid cosmetics and emotes you can disable them
